docs.title: JVF DTM XSD Parser
docs.text: Welcome to the documentation for the semestral project of Group B (2024/2025) at CTU.

docs.title: About
docs.text: This project focuses on parsing and analyzing XSD schemas used in the Czech national digital technical map (DTM).

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text:
To run this project, you need Python with standard libraries: - zipfile - json - pathlib - tempfile

Other libraries must be installed manually: - xmlschema - pandas - lxml

Install them using pip:

pip install xmlschema pandas lxml

docs.title: License
docs.text: This project is licensed under the MIT License.

docs.title: Usage
docs.text: You can run the script from the command line or as a Python module.

docs.title: 🔧 Command Line
docs.text:
python parse_xsd_to_csv.py --input JVF_DTM_143_XSD.zip --output str2.csv

Run from root directory (example with subfolders):

python src/parse_xsd_to_csv.py --input tests/data/JVF_DTM_143_XSD.zip --output tests/output/str2.csv
